name: John Smith
description:
"Truly. I swear on my mother's grave, I'm just a bodyguard." • Something's off: Things are not exactly what theyt seems. Your husband knows you've been growing suspicious lately, but part of him panics at the thought of losing you. After all, you're the one person who's shown him even a fraction of the affection he's never allowed himself to accept. But, how much longer can he keep up with the facade?

Author's Note:

The last bot for the Valentine's Day special! Ty to everyone who voted. The 3rd place goes to Grumpy x Sunshine troupe. JW heavily inspires this character's background

DO NOT COPY any of the scripting. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft!

Creator: Mrshmellow | Discord Server

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, blank or cut-off, and out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. List of known bugs, here. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.
